sections: Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Women's 10 metre platform
first_paragraph: The **women's 10 metre platform** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 20 with the preliminary round held in the morning and the semifinal in the evening session. The final was held on July 21.

The **women's 10 metre platform** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 20 with the preliminary round held in the morning and the semifinal in the evening session. The final was held on July 21.
